mapper.select:
SELECT fs.`科目编号` AS subjectId, fs.`科目编码` AS subjectCode, fs.`科目名称` AS subjectName, fs.`上级科目编码` AS parentSubjectCode, fs.`科目级次` AS subjectLevel, fs.`全科目名称` AS fullSubjectName, fs.`科目类别` AS subjectCategory, fs.`余额方向` AS balanceDirection, fs.`是否为现金科目` AS isCashSubject, fs.`辅助核算` AS auxiliaryAccounting, fs.`数量核算` AS quantityAccounting, fs.`外币核算` AS foreignCurrencyAccounting, fs.`是否启用` AS enabled, fs.`version` AS version, fs.`创建时间` AS createTime, fs.`更新时间` AS updateTime, fs.`备注` AS remark, e1.`员工姓名` AS createUserName, e2.`员工姓名` AS updateUserName FROM FUND_SUBJECT fs LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON fs.`创建人编码` = e1.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON fs.`更新人编码` = e2.`员工编码`
AND fs.`科目编码` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.subjectCode}, '%')
AND fs.`科目名称` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.subjectName}, '%')
AND fs.`科目类别` = #{query.subjectCategory}
AND fs.`是否启用` = #{query.enabled}
ORDER BY
fs.`科目编码`
fs.`科目名称`
fs.`科目类别`
fs.`余额方向`
fs.`是否启用`
fs.`创建时间`
fs.`更新时间`
fs.`创建时间`
DESC
ASC
ORDER BY fs.`创建时间` DESC
SELECT fs.`科目编号` AS subjectId, fs.`科目编码` AS subjectCode, fs.`科目名称` AS subjectName, fs.`科目类别` AS subjectCategory FROM FUND_SUBJECT fs WHERE fs.`是否启用` = 1 ORDER BY fs.`科目编码` ASC
SELECT * FROM FUND_SUBJECT WHERE `科目编码` = #{subjectCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE FUND_SUBJECT SET `是否启用` = #{enabled}, `更新时间` = NOW(), `更新人编码` = #{updateUserId} WHERE `科目编号` IN
#{subjectId}
mapper.select: SELECT fs.`科目编号` AS subjectId, fs.`科目编码` AS subjectCode, fs.`科目名称` AS subjectName, fs.`上级科目编码` AS parentSubjectCode, fs.`科目级次` AS subjectLevel, fs.`全科目名称` AS fullSubjectName, fs.`科目类别` AS subjectCategory, fs.`余额方向` AS balanceDirection, fs.`是否为现金科目` AS isCashSubject, fs.`辅助核算` AS auxiliaryAccounting, fs.`数量核算` AS quantityAccounting, fs.`外币核算` AS foreignCurrencyAccounting, fs.`是否启用` AS enabled, fs.`version` AS version, fs.`创建时间` AS createTime, fs.`更新时间` AS updateTime, e1.`员工姓名` AS createUserName, e2.`员工姓名` AS updateUserName FROM FUND_SUBJECT fs LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e1 ON fs.`创建人编码` = e1.`员工编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e2 ON fs.`更新人编码` = e2.`员工编码` ORDER BY fs.`科目编码` ASC
